creator: dreamcat4@gmail.com
text:
No. Scratch that. This IS the qjial.bootime rc.d script. Who knew that was a place to overwrite jails settings files ??!! Clearly not I. Otherwise would have known to be including such fixes / ammendments in with the original patch.

Don't even want to ask why. Or wish to hear any explanations for reasons behind what is going on in there. Let's just make a patch for it (the qjail rc.d script). To be included whenever the next qjail release. (from my point) This is not considered to be terribly urgent (for me / Finch users). Since we have an auto-patching function for qjail.

I make a patch soon.
